item.name: Ceruleum Balloons
item.description: Filled with gasified ceruleum, this festive assortment of balloons will carry you sky-high in high spirits.

mount.name: Set Of Ceruleum Balloons
mount.action: Summon forth your set of ceruleum balloons. Propulsion not included.
mount.description: Filled with gasified ceruleum, this festive assortment of balloons boasts enough buoyancy to lift a full-grown Roegadyn off the ground. However, it possesses no means of propulsion, and one is required to provide one's own wind magicks to move.
mount.tooltip:
Squawk! Bring balloon directly
over unbelievers' dung heap!
- Ixali Chieftain
